nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Stereo input signal, duplicated to both paths by container.split

nodes.label: Split (copy to paths)
nodes.description: container.split copies input to dry_path and wet_path

nodes.label: dry_wet_mixer (xfader)
nodes.description: Linear crossfade controller: target[0]=1-x to dry_gain, target[1]=x to wet_gain

nodes.label: dry_gain
nodes.description: Applies dry crossfade gain (1-DryWet) to dry signal

nodes.label: dummy (user processing)
nodes.description: Placeholder (math.mul, Value=1.0). User replaces with wet effect processing.

nodes.label: wet_gain
nodes.description: Applies wet crossfade gain (DryWet) to wet signal

nodes.label: Sum paths
nodes.description: container.split sums dry_path and wet_path outputs
